query: SELECT id, name, email, role, authMethod, openId, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_password' ELSE 'no_password' END as pwStatus FROM users WHERE authMethod = 'email' OR openId LIKE 'email_%' LIMIT 20;
